---
title: ""
listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents: ["posts", "adroitly"]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 5
  categories: true
---

## Hi, I'm Gabriel

Welcome to my blog where I explore technical topics that interest me. I write about projects, experiments, and ideas I'm working on.

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

[View more blog posts →](blog.qmd)  |  [Company Showcase →](adroitly.qmd)
